title: activity — model relationships
description: Activity inherits spatie's polymorphic subject + causer FKs. Adds tenant_id FK.

outbound.description: Nullable when created by system commands with no tenant context (deploy, seed). Otherwise required.
Spatie contract: the model that was acted upon.
Spatie contract: the User (or Service) that caused the event.

inbound.description: Any model using HasActivityLog gets an `activities()` morphMany on the fly via spatie's HasActivities trait.
